name: 46 - We Telegram Interactive Decision Buttons TEST ONLY - TEMPLATE

parameters.content:
TEMPLATE ONLY — active=false. Inbound NOT activated by this commit.

We: Telegram callback/inbound -> decision_id correlation -> duplicate/stale guard -> sanitized receipt.

callback_data format:
  dp:D-9998-T:1 | dp:D-9998-T:2 | dp:D-9998-T:3
Optional note (design only):
  note:D-9998-T:<text>

Configure in n8n UI only:
- **CONFIGURE_TELEGRAM_CREDENTIAL_IN_N8N_UI**
- **CONFIGURE_ALLOWED_CHAT_ID_IN_N8N_UI**
- **CONFIGURE_DECISION_STATE_STORE_IN_N8N_UI**

STATE STORE PLACEHOLDER — configure later; no real table/id in Git.

Future live gate may require temporary workflow activation to receive callbacks. One step at a time.

nodes.name: NOTE - template only inbound not active

parameters.content:
STATE STORE PLACEHOLDER — configure **CONFIGURE_DECISION_STATE_STORE_IN_N8N_UI** later.
No real Data Table id or rows in Git.
Template uses workflow staticData only for duplicate guard demo; replace with explicit test-only store in live gate.
